Latest opportunities Tech with a Twist Tech with a Twist In this section Culture Tech with a Twist Job Opportunities Menu English en English Français Menu Home Our Global Presence India Pernod Ricard India Follow Pernod Ricard India Join us on social media Select language English Français About Pernod Ricard India Pernod Ricard India Private Limited (PRI) is a fully owned subsidiary of Pernod Ricard South Asia and a fast-growing multinational alcohol-beverage company delivering quality products to its consumers across the country. Home to renowned brands in each category, Pernod Ricard India holds one of the most dynamic and premium portfolios in the industry, led by Seagram’s whiskies that include Longitude 77, Royal Stag, Royal Stag Barrel Select, Xclamat!on, Blenders Pride, Blenders Pride Reserve Collection,100 Pipers and a wide range of international premium brands such as Chivas Regal, Ballantine’s, The Glenlivet, Royal Salute and Jameson Irish whiskey. Some of the eminent brands in the white spirits category include ABSOLUT vodka, Jacob’s Creek and Campo Viejo wines, Martell cognac, Beefeater and Monkey 47 gin, Kahlúa, and Malibu liqueurs, Mumm and Perrier-Jouët champagne Key Figures 50 Global footprint of the countries where Seagram whiskies is present 1593 Employees in India 24 Production sites Welcome to our Convivial Realm As “Créateurs de convivialité,” our vision is to turn every social interaction into a genuine and convivial experience by enabling people to share their moments of joy and camaraderie. Conviviality at work means bringing people together for meaningful and joyful moments through our passion, drive and creativity. Discover our Culture Sustainability & Responsibility The Pernod Ricard India Foundation (PRIF) aims to shape a better future for our communities by focusing on water resource management, education, livelihood generation, healthcare and empowering social change makers. Learn more Our Brands View all our brands India Royal Stag Classic Indian whisky brand Learn more India Blenders Pride Premium whisky blended from Indian grain spirits and Scotch malts. Learn more India Longitude 77 Indian Single Malt Whisky Learn more Join us at Pernod Ricard India As creators of conviviality our ambition is to turn every social interaction into a genuine and friendly experience of sharing. Our culture is driven by three cardinal values: entrepreneurial spirit, mutual trust and a sense of ethics. Spark conviviality at work, apply now. Phone: (+91) 124-2358001 Email: Media Enquiries: Info.India@pernod-ricard.com General Enquiries, Consumer & Quality Enquiries: [CLICK HERE] Consumer questions and concerns Please contact our customer care (details mentioned on the product label) or write to us at feedback@pripl.in Vigil Mechanism/Whistle Blower Policy The Company has a Whistle Blower Policy in place which provides for adequate safeguards against victimization of directors, employees, contract employees working at the Company’ workplace or otherwise, as well as any vendor, service providers, consultants that the Company has business relation with. This vigil mechanism aims to provide a channel to the directors, employees, contract employees working at the Company’ workplace or otherwise, as well as any vendor, service providers, consultants that the Company has business relation with to report genuine concerns online or over the phone, in a confidential manner, to the Integrity & Whistle Blower Committee or directly to the Chairperson – Integrity & Whistle Blower Committee about unethical behavior, actual or suspected fraud or violation of code of conduct or policies of the Company. The policy has been appropriately communicated by the Company. Notice/Annual Return The public at large is hereby informed that Pernod Ricard India (P) Ltd. have been granted Environmental Clearance for Modernization of existing 7500 KL per annum grain based distillery & Proposed 0.85 MW Co-generation Power Plant at Village Karoda, Tehsil Behror, District Alwar, Rajasthan by “State Environmental Impact Assessment Authority”, Rajasthan, Department of Environment, (Government of Rajasthan), vide letter No. FL (4)/SEIAA/SEAC-Raj/Sectt/Project/ Cat. 1(a) B1 (15495)/2018-19 dated 20th Sep., 2019. Copy of Environment Clearance is available in the office of “Rajasthan State Pollution Control Board” for information of general public and can also be seen on website “http://environment.rajasthan.gov.in” of Environment Department, Govt. of Rajasthan.
